Fields.Name: Behavior Variation ID
Fields.Description: Variation ID used when calculating the action ID.

Fields.Name: Name ID
Fields.Description: NPC Name Message Parameter ID

Fields.Name: Turn Velocity
Fields.Description: Rotational speed [degrees / second] that can turn in 1 second.

Fields.Name: Capsule Height
Fields.Description: The height of the capsule per character.

Fields.Name: Capsule Radius
Fields.Description: Radius of capsule per character.

Fields.Name: Weight
Fields.Description: weight.

Fields.Name: Base HP
Fields.Description: Death grace.

Fields.Name: Base FP
Fields.Description: Magic usage.

Fields.Name: Base Souls
Fields.Description: The amount of soul that a character can get at the time of death.

Fields.Name: Item Lot ID 1
Fields.Description: Itemlot ID to be dropped upon death

Fields.Name: Item Lot ID (Humanity)
Fields.Description: (Most Likely not used in ds3)

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption: Physical
Fields.Description: Set the damage cut rate when guarding for each attack

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption: Magic
Fields.Description: If it is not a guard attack, enter 0

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption: Fire
Fields.Description: How much to cut the fire attack?

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption: Lightning
Fields.Description: How much to cut the electric shock attack?

Fields.Name: Anim ID Offset 1
Fields.Description: All animations will be played with IDs shifted by this number. If not, the original anime ID is referenced.

Fields.Name: Lock Gaze Point - Dummy Poly ID [0]
Fields.Description: Gaze at the Damipoli specified when locking the Lock-on Damipoly 22X (-1 Invalid)

Fields.Name: Lock Gaze Point - Dummy Poly ID [1]
Fields.Description: Gaze at the Damipoli specified when locking the Lock-on Damipoly 22X (-1 Invalid)

Fields.Description: Gaze at the Damipoli specified when locking the Lock-on Damipoly 22X (-1 Invalid)

Fields.Name: Lock Gaze Point - Dummy Poly ID [5]
Fields.Description: Gaze at the Damipoli specified when locking the Lock-on Damipoly 22X (-1 Invalid)

Fields.Name: Network Warp Display
Fields.Description: Distance to warp instead of complementary movement in network synchronization. Faster people (ex dragons) need to be longer.

Fields.Name: Debug Action - R1
Fields.Description: Register the ID from the action parameter tool and specify the action.

Fields.Name: Debug Action - L1
Fields.Description: Register the ID from the action parameter tool and specify the action.

Fields.Name: Debug Action - R2
Fields.Description: Register the ID from the action parameter tool and specify the action.

Fields.Description: Register the ID from the action parameter tool and specify the action.

Fields.Description: Register the ID from the action parameter tool and specify the action.

Fields.Name: Debug Action - Circle
Fields.Description: Register the ID from the action parameter tool and specify the action.

Fields.Name: Debug Action - Cross
Fields.Description: Register the ID from the action parameter tool and specify the action.

Fields.Name: Debug Action - Triangle
Fields.Description: Register the ID from the action parameter tool and specify the action.

Fields.Name: Debug Action - Left D-Pad
Fields.Description: Register the ID from the action parameter tool and specify the action.

Fields.Name: Debug Action - Right D-Pad
Fields.Description: Register the ID from the action parameter tool and specify the action.

Fields.Name: Debug Action - Down D-Pad
Fields.Description: Register the ID from the action parameter tool and specify the action.

Fields.Name: Debug Action - Up D-Pad
Fields.Description: Register the ID from the action parameter tool and specify the action.

Fields.Name: Anim ID Offset 2
Fields.Description: All animations will be played with IDs shifted by this number. If not, the animation ID of the animation ID offset 1 is referred to.

Fields.Name: Stamina
Fields.Description: Total amount of stamina.

Fields.Name: Resist: Poison
Fields.Description: Difficulty in getting poisonous

Fields.Name: Resist: Toxic
Fields.Description: Difficulty in getting sick

Fields.Name: Resist: Bleed
Fields.Description: Difficulty in getting bleeding abnormalities

Fields.Name: Resist: Curse
Fields.Description: Difficulty in dealing with abnormal curse conditions

Fields.Name: Ghost Model ID
Fields.Description: Replacement model when wandering ghost, texture ID

Fields.Name: Override Resource Chr ID
Fields.Description: Replace resource ID during normal operation (do not use it unnecessarily)

Fields.Name: Guard Angle
Fields.Description: Defense range angle when guarding weapons. Pending

Fields.Name: Override Texture Chr ID
Fields.Description: Normal replacement texture character ID (do not use it unnecessarily)

Fields.Name: Drop Type
Fields.Description: Display method when dropping an item (corpse emission or item display)

Fields.Name: Team Type
Fields.Description: Determines enemy\ally\aggro\damage status in relation to other teams.

Fields.Name: Lock-on Distance
Fields.Description: Lock-on distance [m]

Fields.Name: Parts Damage Type
Fields.Description:
Determines if weak parts (such as the head) will be affected by all attacks or just arrow attacks.
Headshot animation will be used for weak part attacks if it exists.

Fields.Name: Guard Level
Fields.Description: Determines guard hit anim used depending on incoming damageLevel.

Fields.Name: Parry Attack
Fields.Description: If this is greater than defender's Parry Defense, the attack cannot be parried.

Fields.Name: Parry Defense
Fields.Description: If this is equal to or greater than attacker's Parry Attack, the attack can be parried.

Fields.Name: SFX Size
Fields.Description: Determines which version of a SpEffect's VFX to use (i.e. bigger poison clouds on bigger enemies).

Fields.Name: Hit Stop Type
Fields.Description: Setting whether to perform hit stop processing

Fields.Name: Ladder End Check Offset Top
Fields.Description: Upper side of the ladder end judgment offset

Fields.Name: Ladder End Check Offset Bottom
Fields.Description: Lower side of ladder end judgment offset

Fields.Name: Use Ragdoll Camera Hit
Fields.Description: Does the camera hit the enemy ragdoll? (Valid only when hitting the player)

Fields.Name: Disable Cloth Rigid Hit
Fields.Description: If you want to prevent the cross rigid from hitting you

Fields.Name: Enemy Type: Type A (Demon)
Fields.Description: Special attack A? Special attack A damage multiplier will be included in the calculation

Fields.Name: Is Ghost
Fields.Description: The opponent's attack will be able to slip through. The attack hits only when the anti-spirit weapon of the weapon para is attacked with the weapon of . Be careful not to confuse it with a wandering ghost

Fields.Name: No Damage Motion
Fields.Description: Do you not play the damage motion when the damage is 0?

Fields.Name: Is Undulating
Fields.Description: Do you match the back and forth rotation of the character with the undulations of the ground? Cannot be used for flying characters

Fields.Name: Is Wandering Ghost
Fields.Description: Will it be a wandering ghost when the player is a client?

Fields.Name: Model Display Mask 0
Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Name: Model Display Mask 1
Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Name: Is Enable Neck Turn
Fields.Description: Do you want to enable the swing set in Param Weaver?

Fields.Name: Disable Respawn upon Rest
Fields.Description: Do you ban respawn?

Fields.Name: Play Movement Anim until Over
Fields.Description: Do you want to play the moving animation until the animation is over? (Like a mayfly dragon.)

Fields.Name: Reduce Processing Load during Crowds
Fields.Description: Do you want to reduce the processing load during crowds? For babies (preferably phalanx)

Fields.Name: Enemy Type: Type B (Undead)
Fields.Description: Special attack B? Special attack B damage multiplier will be included in the calculation

Fields.Name: Enemy Type: Type C (Hollow)
Fields.Description: Special attack C? Special attack C damage multiplier will be included in the calculation

Fields.Name: Enemy Type: Type D (Abyssal)
Fields.Description: Special attack D? Special attack D damage multiplier will be included in the calculation

Fields.Name: Always Use Special Turn
Fields.Description: Always execute a special turn (even if there is no navigation mesh at the turn destination, the special turn is continuously executed)

Fields.Name: Vow Flag A
Fields.Description:
Determines Vow ID depending on permutation of flags.
ABC
000 - Vow 0
100 - Vow 1
010 - Vow 2
110 - Vow 3
001 - Vow 4
101 - Vow 5
011 - Vow 6
111 - Vow 7

Fields.Name: Vow Flag B
Fields.Description:
Determines Vow ID depending on permutation of flags.
ABC
000 - Vow 0
100 - Vow 1
010 - Vow 2
110 - Vow 3
001 - Vow 4
101 - Vow 5
011 - Vow 6
111 - Vow 7

Fields.Name: Vow Flag C
Fields.Description:
Determines Vow ID depending on permutation of flags.
ABC
000 - Vow 0
100 - Vow 1
010 - Vow 2
110 - Vow 3
001 - Vow 4
101 - Vow 5
011 - Vow 6
111 - Vow 7

Fields.Name: Disable Init Dead
Fields.Description: If you do not make an initial death, TRUE, even if you kill and save it, the corpse will not be reproduced.

Fields.Name: Is Hit Rumble
Fields.Description: TRUE if it vibrates when hit. Use when you want to change from a normal hit stop, such as a dead person.

Fields.Name: Use Smooth Turning
Fields.Description: Whether to perform interpolation when turning between nodes in route movement

Fields.Name: Enemy Type: Type E
Fields.Description: Special attack E? Special attack E damage multiplier will be included in the calculation

Fields.Name: Enemy Type: Type F
Fields.Description: Special attack F? Special attack F damage multiplier will be included in the calculation

Fields.Name: Model Display Mask [16]
Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Name: Model Display Mask [31]
Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Name: Item Pickup Radius
Fields.Description: Radius to be added as a correction to the cylinder radius of normal Item search judgment (applicable to enemy drop items. Used for large characters etc.)

Fields.Name: Chr Capsule Height
Fields.Description: The height of the capsule per character.

Fields.Name: Chr Capsule Radius
Fields.Description: Radius of capsule per character.

Fields.Name: Special Turn Type
Fields.Description: Special turning type

Fields.Name: Is Boss Soul Drop
Fields.Description: Do you get a boss in soul?

Fields.Name: Is Bullet Owner - By Object
Fields.Description: If you become the owner of a bullet, a flag that applies the object's damage calculation related to the bullet. Used for damage correction by power.

Fields.Name: Use FootIK Filter for Low Hit
Fields.Description: Whether to use the FootIk filter for low hits

Fields.Name: Use PvP Damage Modifiers
Fields.Description: Decide whether to calculate damage as a player when calculating damage. If it is invalid, it is treated as an enemy.

Fields.Name: Is Synced with Host World
Fields.Description: Can only be activated when active in the host world

Fields.Name: Skip Weak Damage Anim
Fields.Description: Weakness damage Whether to skip animation playback. Part damage rate and defense material are treated as weak points just by not playing the animation.

Fields.Name: Is Enable UI
Fields.Description: Needs testing.

Fields.Name: Is Create Corpse Target
Fields.Description: Needs testing.

Fields.Name: Special Turn Distance Threshold
Fields.Description: Make a special turn when the distance to the target is greater than or equal to the set threshold

Fields.Name: Automatic Foot Effect - SFX ID
Fields.Description: The SFX identifier used in the automatic foot effect. (ZZZ of XYYZZZ)

Fields.Name: Damaged - Material SE [1]
Fields.Description: Determine the SE that sounds when damaged. 1. It is OK to set it by appearance.

Fields.Name: Damaged - Material SFX [1]
Fields.Description: Determine the SFX that occurs when you take damage. 1. It is OK to set it by appearance.

Fields.Name: Weak Point - Material SE [2]
Fields.Description: Determines the SE that sounds when the weak point is damaged. 2

Fields.Name: Weak Point - Material SFX [2]
Fields.Description: Determines the SFX that occurs when the weak point is damaged. 2

Fields.Name: Damaged - Material SE [2]
Fields.Description: Determine the SE that sounds when damaged. 2. It is OK to set it by appearance.

Fields.Name: Damaged - Material SFX [2]
Fields.Description: Determine the SFX that occurs when you take damage. 2. It is OK to set it by appearance.

Fields.Name: Automatic Foot Effect - Decal Base ID [1]
Fields.Description: Decal to be attached when a foot effect occurs. Floor material is also taken into consideration

Fields.Name: Toughness
Fields.Description: Basic value of toughness

Fields.Name: Toughness Correction
Fields.Description: Correction value for toughness recovery time

Fields.Name: Cloth Update Offset
Fields.Description: Cross update priority offset [m]

Fields.Name: NPC Player Weight Type
Fields.Description: Equipment weight type applied for NPC players

Fields.Name: Replacement Change - Model ID
Fields.Description: Normal replacement model, texture ID

Fields.Name: Replacement Change - Anim Chr ID
Fields.Description: Replace the target animation with the specified ID Anibnd

Fields.Name: Phantom Shader ID
Fields.Description: ID of the phantom parameter .xlsm to apply

Fields.Name: Multiplayer Correction Param ID
Fields.Description: Multiplayer correction parameter ID

Fields.Name: FootIK Ankle Pitch Limit Angle
Fields.Description: FootIK Ankle pitch limit angle (-1 no limit). If you have not set Foot End L S in HAT, this angle is used in common with rolls.

Fields.Name: Resist: Frostbite
Fields.Description: Difficulty in getting cold air condition abnormal

Fields.Name: Guard Resist: Frostbite
Fields.Description: How much to cut the attack power against cold air (set as a special effect parameter)

Fields.Name: Lock Camera Param ID
Fields.Description: The ID of the lock camera parameter applied to the camera when locked on. Highest priority. Unused if -1

Fields.Name: Disable Lock-on Angle
Fields.Description: Create a conical lock-on non-lockable area beneath the enemy. The angle of the size of the cone. Can be changed temporarily from TAE

Fields.Name: LOD Level to Disable Cloth Processing
Fields.Description: Set the LOD level to turn off cross processing

Fields.Name: Flask Recovery Param ID
Fields.Description: When the character dies, the data ID of the est usage count recovery parameter .xlsm, which is the same as the value, is acquired and the est bottle is recovered. Unused if -1

Fields.Name: Role Name ID
Fields.Description: Specify the role name at the time of summoning. -1 Use the default role name of the target spirit body. 0 No display. 1 or more Used as a text ID.

Fields.Name: HP/FP Flask Recovery Chance
Fields.Description: HP / MP est recovery probability when defeating an enemy. The numerator is obtained from the NPC para with 10000 as the denominator.

Fields.Name: HP Flask Recovery Chance
Fields.Description: Recovery probability of MP Est when defeating an enemy. The numerator is obtained from the NPC para with 10000 as the denominator.

Fields.Name: FP Flask Recovery Chance
Fields.Description: Recovery probability of MP Est when defeating an enemy. The numerator is obtained from the NPC para with 10000 as the denominator.

Fields.Name: Missed HP/FP Flask Recovery - Bonus Chance
Fields.Description: Next time probability increase value when you miss the HP / MP est recovery lottery. Addition value of numerator.

Fields.Name: Missed HP Flask Recovery - Bonus Chance
Fields.Description: The next probability increase value when you miss the HP Est Recovery Lottery. Addition value of numerator.

Fields.Name: Missed FP Flask Recovery - Bonus Chance
Fields.Description: The next probability increase value when the MP est recovery lottery is missed. Addition value of numerator.

Fields.Name: Wandering Ghost Phantom ID
Fields.Description: Phantom shader with ID specified only on the guest side Specify the phantom shader ID and make it an illusion

Fields.Name: Listen Head Size
Fields.Description: The offset size to be set instead of the capsule offset at the time of hearing judgment. Use this value as an offset only if it is set to 0 or higher.
